memoryArtifacts.headline:
Richard Pellet
(1475 – 10 May 1532)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Richard Pellett was born about 1470, probably in Steyning, Sussex, England. 

He was the son of William Pellett and his wife Joan. 

He most likely had two older brothers, and possibly an older sister …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Pellett於大約1485年出生在英國素可斯易寧時，他的父親William Pellett35歲，母親Joan Baker36歲。他於1516年之前與Joan Wells在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1532年5月10日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可斯易寧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Pellett于大约1485年出生在英国素可斯易寧时，他的父亲William Pellett35岁，母亲Joan Baker36岁。他于1516年之前与Joan Wells在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1532年5月10日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 素可斯易寧。

nameMeanings.name: Pellett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): either from a pet form of the personal name Pell , or a metonymic occupational name for a furrier, from Old French pellet ‘fur’, a diminutive of pel ‘skin’. Compare Pelletier .

variants.name: Pell
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Pell, apet form of Peter .
English: metonymic occupational name fora dealer in furs, from Middle English, Old French pel‘skin’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Pellett was born about 1485, in Steyning, Sussex, England, his father, William Pellett, was 35 and his mother, Joan Baker, was 36. He married Joan Wells before 1516, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 10 May 1532, in his hometown, and was buried in Steyning, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Pellett est né environ 1485, à Steyning, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William Pellett, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan Baker, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Joan Wells avant 1516, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 10 mai 1532, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Steyning, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Pellett um 1485 in Steyning, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Pellett 35 und seine Mutter Joan Baker 36. Er hat vor 1516 in England Joan Wells geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 10. Mai 1532 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Steyning, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Joan Wells prima del 1516, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 10 maggio 1532, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Steyning, West Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Pellettが約1485年にイギリススセックスステイニングで生まれた時，父William Pellettは35歳，母Joan Bakerは36歳であった。1516年以前にイギリスでJoan Wellsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1532年5月10日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスステイニングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Pellett(이)가 대략 1485년 영국 수세스 스테이닝에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Pellett(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Baker(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1516년 이전 영국에서 Joan Wells(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1532년 5월 10일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 스테이닝에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Pellett nasceu aproximadamente 1485, em Steyning, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Pellett, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joan Baker, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Wells antes 1516, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 10 de maio de 1532, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Steyning, West Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Pellett родился около 1485 г. в местности стининг, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Pellett было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Baker, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Wells перед 1516 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 10 май 1532 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности стининг, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
